summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: invertibility = bijectivity. 35 lattice points (7×5) colored BLUE→RED by x-coordinate deformed by A=[[0, 2], [-1, 1]] (det=2). ValueTracker t_tr forward/back; always_redraw shows each point maps to unique image. Injective (unique image) + surjective (every y has preimage) ⇒ A^(-1) exists.
